citations.quote: The outstanding arrears for your accommodation are £4605.55
From Donnelly, Kathleen <K.Donnelly@napier.ac.uk> on behalf of fees <fees@napier.ac.uk> Date Wed 08/04/2026 13:29 To Elbushra, Anfal <40805511@live.napier.ac.uk>
It has come to our attention that you are in arrears for your accommodation.
If you have made payments, please send copies of your receipts.
Kathleen Donnelly Senior Finance Assistant Edinburgh Napier University Finance Sighthill Campus Sighthill Court Edinburgh EH11 4BN Tel 0131 455 6806
If you need any additional help with funding, please contact Studentfunding@napier.ac.uk

findings.text: Email sent by Kathleen Donnelly on behalf of fees@napier.ac.uk to Anfal Elbushra on 08/04/2026.
Email notifies recipient of arrears and requests payment receipts if already paid.
Sender is Kathleen Donnelly, Senior Finance Assistant at Edinburgh Napier University.
No payment records, receipts, or account statements are present in the current evidence. Task cannot be completed without additional records.

proposed_artifacts.content: Task: Request payment records from Edinburgh Napier University. Available evidence: one email (NAP-SRC-0021) from Kathleen Donnelly to Anfal Elbushra dated 08/04/2026 stating accommodation arrears of £4605.55. No payment records, receipts, or account statements are present. A formal request to Edinburgh Napier University for payment history, receipts, and account statements is needed. Contact: Kathleen Donnelly (K.Donnelly@napier.ac.uk) or fees@napier.ac.uk.
proposed_artifacts.title: Evidence summary for payment records request

proposed_tasks.instructions: Draft a formal letter or email to Edinburgh Napier University (to Kathleen Donnelly or fees@napier.ac.uk) requesting: (1) full payment history for Anfal Elbushra's accommodation account, (2) copies of any receipts or payment confirmations, (3) a breakdown of the £4605.55 arrears, and (4) any correspondence regarding missed payments. Include reference to the email dated 08/04/2026 (NAP-SRC-0021). Do not send the request; output the draft as a proposed artifact.
proposed_tasks.title: Draft formal request for payment records from Edinburgh Napier University

redaction_flags.text: Email contains personal email address (albshryanfal4@gmail.com) – potential privacy concern.
Email contains student ID (40805511) – potential data protection issue.

risk_flags.text: Absence of payment records may lead to incorrect arrears assessment or missed defenses.
Email is from April 2026; staleness may affect relevance or accuracy of arrears figure.
No evidence of service or receipt of the email by the recipient.

summary: Task is to request payment records from Edinburgh Napier University. Only one source (NAP-SRC-0021) is available: an email from Kathleen Donnelly to Anfal Elbushra dated 08/04/2026 stating accommodation arrears of £4605.55. No payment records, receipts, or account statements are present. The task cannot be completed with current evidence; a follow-up task is proposed to draft a formal records request.

uncertainties.text: No payment records or receipts from Edinburgh Napier University are available in the evidence bundle.
It is unknown whether the arrears amount of £4605.55 is accurate or disputed.
No response or further correspondence from the recipient (Anfal Elbushra) is present.
